title: Proxima Midnight
content:
{{SomethingElse|the Proxima Midnight [[Variant]] from the [[Cosmic Time Heist Universe|2014 Time Heist]]|Proxima Midnight/Cosmic Time Heist|Proxima Midnight}} {{CharHub|Proxima Midnight|Proxima Midnight}} {{Character |image = Proxima02.jpg |real name = Proxima Midnight |gender = Female |DOD = [[2018|May 2018]]{{Ref|AIW}}{{Ref|SnapAMatW}}{{Ref|MSTMCUAOT}} |affiliation = [[Black Order]] |movie = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[Guardians of the Galaxy (film)|Guardians of the Galaxy]]'' (indirectly mentioned)
}}''[[Avengers: Infinity War]]''}} |tv series = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[Loki (TV series)|Loki]]''
*''[[Glorious Purpose (Loki Season One)|Glorious Purpose]]'' (footage)}}}} |comic = ''[[Avengers: Endgame Prelude]]'' |book = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[Look Out for the Little Guy! (novel)|Look Out for the Little Guy!]]'' (indirectly mentioned)}}}} |actor = [[Carrie Coon]]
[[Monique Ganderton]] |status = Deceased}} {{Quote|[[Vision|He]]'ll die alone. As will you.|Proxima Midnight to [[Wanda Maximoff]]|Avengers: Infinity War}} '''Proxima Midnight''' was an adoptive daughter of [[Thanos]] and a member of the [[Black Order]]. She joined her father in his quest for the six [[Infinity Stones]], initially [[Attack on the Statesman|attacked]] the ''[[Statesman]]'' with her brothers and helped to kill the [[Asgardians]] aboard and retrieve the [[Space Stone]]. She later [[Attack on Vision|attacked]] [[Vision]] and [[Wanda Maximoff]], almost killing them until the arrival of [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]], [[Sam Wilson|Falcon]] and [[Black Widow]]. She was forced to flee when Widow wounded [[Corvus Glaive]] before returning to fight in the [[Battle of Wakanda]]. She fought and nearly killed both [[Okoye]] and Black Widow before Maximoff used her telekinesis to throw her to the path of a [[Thresher]], killing her. ==Biography== ===[[Black Order]]=== ====Becoming a Child of Thanos==== Proxima Midnight, like the rest of the [[Black Order]], was a member of a world conquered by [[Thanos]] in his quest to wipe out half the universe. Thanos took the orphaned Midnight and raised her as his own child, training her to be a deadly member of the Black Order.{{Ref|AIW}} Unlike [[Ebony Maw]], [[Cull Obsidian]], [[Nebula]], and [[Gamora]], her adoptive siblings, Midnight was able to actually feel love for [[Corvus Glaive]], her husband and fellow adoptive brother.[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fh43gxcu91s Michael James Shaw: Becoming Marvel Infinity War's Villian Corvus Glaive!] As with her fellow siblings, with the exception of Gamora, Midnight was disliked by Nebula.{{Ref|GotG}} ====[[Attack on the Statesman|Attack on the ''Statesman'']]==== [[File:ProximaMidnight-FirstScene.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Midnight standing guard over [[Loki]]]] {{Quote|There are two more stones on [[Earth]]. Find them, my children, and bring them to me on [[Titan]]."
"Father, we will not fail you.|[[Thanos]] and Proxima Midnight|Avengers: Infinity War}} Along with the rest of the [[Black Order]] and [[Thanos]], Midnight was present when they first attacked [[Xandar]] in search of the [[Power Stone]]. Thanos eventually stole the [[Orb]] from the [[Nova Corps Headquarters]] after defeating the [[Nova Corps]]. Eventually, the ''[[Sanctuary II]]'' had crossed paths with them in space with the [[Asgardians]] onboard of the ''[[Statesman]]''. [[File:BlackOrderBowsOverThanos.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Midnight humbly bows down to [[Thanos]]]] Midnight intercepted the ''Statesman'' holding the survivors of [[Ragnarök]], participating in Thanos' assault on the ship in their search of the [[Space Stone]]. Midnight and her brothers stood guard while Thanos demanded that [[Loki]] surrender the [[Tesseract]] containing the [[Space Stone]]. As Loki was going to give the Tesseract to Thanos, [[Hulk]] violently attacked him. After Thanos defeated Hulk and [[Thor]], who was restrained by [[Ebony Maw]], he had acquired the Space Stone to his [[Infinity Gauntlet]]. [[File:Thanos & Black Order Teleport (Statesman).png|{{AltFloat}}|The [[Black Order]] and [[Thanos]] teleporting]] After Thanos harnessed the power of the Space Stone, he ordered his children to retrieve two [[Infinity Stones]] on [[Earth]], the [[Mind Stone]] and [[Time Stone]], to which Midnight bowed down to her knee and agreed to her father's demands without questioning, promising Thanos that they would not fail him. Leaving the grieving Thor to mourn over Loki's lifeless body, Thanos destroyed the ship before departing with his children, using the newly acquired Space Stone to teleport them away.{{Ref|AIW}} ====[[Attack on Vision]]==== [[File:Infinity War 185.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Midnight fighting against [[Wanda Maximoff]]]] {{Quote|We don't want to kill you. But we will."
"You'll never get the chance again.|[[Black Widow]] and Proxima Midnight|Avengers: Infinity War}} Proxima Midnight and [[Corvus Glaive]] then went to [[Edinburgh]], [[Scotland]], to claim the [[Mind Stone]]. The pair found and ambushed [[Vision]], with Glaive stabbing the android, and Midnight attacking [[Wanda Maximoff]] before she could aid him, blasting her with her [[Proxima Midnight's Spear|spear]], and sending Maximoff crashing through a shop window. [[File:Infinity War 280.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Midnight furiously fights [[Wanda Maximoff]]]] Midnight then pinned Vision down much with Glaive, as he attempted to forcefully remove the Mind Stone from Vision's head. However, they were both swiftly knocked down by blasts from Maximoff, who levitated Vision and herself and attempted to escape the children of [[Thanos]]. After they landed, Midnight and Glaive quickly found the most again, Glaive clashed with Vision, while Midnight attacked Maximoff. Midnight swung her spear at Maximoff, who used her powers to block all of Midnight's strikes. [[File:Proximascarletcorvus.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Midnight confronting [[Wanda Maximoff]]]] However, Midnight soon gained the upper hand, unleashing an energy blast from her spear that knocked Maximoff onto the ground. Midnight then lunged down at her victim, but her blow was stopped at the last second by Maximoff, who held her spear in place. This gave Maximoff the chance to get up, and she and Midnight continued to fight. After a blast from Vision accidentally blew up a nearby car, Midnight was flung into the flaming wreck by Maximoff, who once again attempted to flee with Vision. [[File:Proximainfinitywar.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Midnight is confronted by [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]]]] However, Midnight swiftly recovered, and sent a blast of energy from her spear at the pair, knocking them out of the sky, and crashing into a train station. Midnight and Glaive then both jumped in through the roof, as Maximoff stood between them and Vision. As a train shot past, Midnight noticed another figure had arrived, and compulsively flung her spear at the newcomer. To her surprise, however, the newcomer caught the spear, and emerged from the darkness, revealing itself to be [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]]. [[File:Proximainfinitywar2.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Midnight fighting against [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]]]] Before the Black Order could react any further, [[Sam Wilson|Falcon]] arrived, diving through the air and kicked Midnight over to a glass window inside a restaurant. When [[Black Widow]] fought against Glaive and used Midnight's own weapon to stab him, she called the weapon back to her, attempting to kill Black Widow, but her strike was blocked by Captain America wielding Glaive's [[Corvus Glaive's Glaive|weapon]], which he then used to cleave Midnight's spear in half, and flung Midnight down next to Glaive. [[File:PMidnight-NeverGetTheChanceAgain.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Midnight threatening the [[Avengers]]' lives]] Midnight crawled over to Glaive's aid, as he groaned in pain from his gruesome stabbing in his abdomen. Midnight told Glaive to get up but told her that he could not move thus not allowing for him to get up, as Black Widow threatened the pair that they would harm them but they would. Midnight rebuffed Black Widow's claim, saying that they would never get the chance again, before escaping with the wounded Glaive.{{Ref|AIW}} ====[[Battle of Wakanda]]==== [[File:Widow, Cap & BP meet Cull Obsidian & Proxima Midnight (Wakanda).png|{{AltFloat}}|Midnight confronts her enemies in [[Wakanda]]]] {{Quote|You are in [[Wakanda]] now. [[Thanos]] will have nothing but dust and blood."
"[[Black Order|We]]... have [[Outriders|blood]] to spare.|[[T'Challa]] and Proxima Midnight|Avengers: Infinity War}} Arriving to [[Wakanda]] with the accompany of [[Cull Obsidian]], the two had attacked [[Birnin Zana]] but was shielded by an impenetrable force field. Midnight and Obsidian dropped down to the ground and met up with [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]] along with [[Black Widow]] and [[T'Challa|Black Panther]] at the other side of the force field. [[File:PMidnight-WeHaveBloodToSpare.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Midnight accepts to battle against [[Wakanda]]]] Midnight unsheathed her [[Proxima Midnight's Sword|sword]] and ran it along the force field, and mocked her opponents, telling them that the [[Vision]] and the [[Mind Stone]] would soon be taken by [[Thanos]]. Black Panther then informed them that they were in Wakanda, and Thanos would have nothing but dust and blood. Accepting the challenge, Midnight claimed they had enough blood to spare, and commanded Thanos' army of [[Outriders]] to be unleashed. [[File:Proxima and Cull.png|{{AltFloat}}|Midnight watches [[Thor]]'s entering [[Wakanda]]]] While the Outriders tried to get ahold of their enemies and went pass through the dome, Midnight smiled as they killed themselves to get through. To prevent the Outriders going around the force field, Black Panther commanded it to be opened, letting in the army, as well as Midnight, alongside with Obsidian. In the ensuing invasion, Midnight watched in horror as [[Thor]] entered Wakanda with [[Groot]] and [[Rocket]]. [[File:ProxMid-StandingStrong.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Midnight prepares to kill [[Wanda Maximoff]]]] Having noticed [[Wanda Maximoff]] had joined the battle, Midnight ordered [[Corvus Glaive]] to take the Mind Stone from Vision, who was being operated on by [[Shuri]]. While the [[Avengers]] took notice of Vision's disappearance, Midnight then confronted Maximoff herself, knocking her off the field and landed on the ground. While Maximoff was lying on a hole in the ground, Midnight stood over her in preparation to kill her, mockingly telling her that she would die alone. [[File:ProximaDeath3.png|{{AltFloat}}|Midnight is thrown into the [[Thresher]]'s way]] However, Black Widow and [[Okoye]] came to Maximoff's aid, telling Midnight she was not alone. Midnight then ferociously fought Black Widow and Okoye. As the battle continued, Midnight was able to hold her own and eventually gain the upper hand over both of them. However, Maximoff telekinetically threw Midnight into the path of a [[Thresher]], which shredded her under its spinning blades, and splatting spots of her blue blood onto Black Widow.{{Ref|AIW}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Superhuman Strength''': Midnight was physically stronger than [[Black Widow]] and [[Okoye]], and also overpower both of them during the [[Battle of Wakanda]]. However, the [[Super Soldier Serum|super-soldier]] [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]] seems to have strength comparable to her, as he was able to hold her at bay using the [[Corvus Glaive's Glaive|Glaive]] to save Black Widow, but displayed visible strain in doing so. Her strength was sufficient enough to easily throw people around as she did to [[Okoye]]. She was also able to knock down Black Widow with a kick and subdue her with her punches despite being blocked by her [[Black Widow Batons|batons]]. *'''Superhuman Durability''': Midnight was able to withstand powerful bolts of [[Wanda Maximoff]]'s telekinetic energy during their first encounter for quite a while, before being defeated by the combined efforts of [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]], [[Black Widow]] and [[Sam Wilson|Falcon]]. Despite being outnumbered two-to-one while fighting Black Widow and [[Okoye]], she was able to stand her ground and suffered minor wounds. She was able to touch [[Black Widow Batons|Black Widow's batons]] with only mild discomfort and could withstand a kick to her abdomen from Black Widow with seemingly no discomfort. She was able to be thrown through a shop front with great force and thrown through a flaming truck without sustaining any heavy injuries. However, it is implied that she is not bulletproof, as she showed discernible fear when Falcon aimed his guns at her, and her first death was a result of being shredded by [[Thresher]]s. *'''Superhuman Speed''': Midnight was fast and agile in battle, able to swiftly attack or parry incoming attacks, as well as dodge or evade her opponents quickly. During her battle with [[Black Widow]] and [[Okoye]], she was able to maintain the upper hand against them. During the [[Attack on Vision|attack on Vision]], Midnight demonstrated this during her brief skirmish with Captain America and Black Widow, as she was able to block attacks from both incredible fighters simultaneously. However, it was not impossible to ambush her, [[Sam Wilson|Falcon]] was able to use the momentum of his flight to send her flying, with Midnight hardly having enough time to react. *'''Superhuman Agility''': Midnight possessed a limited degree of superhuman agility, adequate enough to leap high into the air, perform complex flips and twists in combat, as well as execute a perfect roll after jumping many feet into the air during her pursuit of Wanda Maximoff. *'''Superhuman Stamina''': Midnight battled both [[Wanda Maximoff]] and [[Vision]] without tiring and then entered the [[Battle of Wakanda]] where she fought even longer. *'''Superhuman Reflexes''': Midnight dodged many of [[Wanda Maximoff]]'s attacks and even dodged both [[Okoye]]'s and [[Black Widow]]'s attacks at the same time. ===Abilities=== *'''Master Combatant''': [[File:Midnight tries to punch Black Widow.jpeg|thumb|250px|Midnight fighting against [[Black Widow]]]] Midnight was an extremely skilled and formidable hand-to-hand combatant, able to employ various weapons like her spear or swords with incredible dexterity and skill in battle. As such, she was able to go toe-to-toe with [[Wanda Maximoff]] on their first meeting with only her combat skill alone, and was only defeated through a combination of teamwork from [[Steve Rogers|Captain America]], [[Black Widow]], and the [[Sam Wilson|Falcon]], all of whom are extremely skilled combatants. In the battle in [[Wakanda]], Midnight was able to take the upper ground in her fight with both [[Black Widow]] and [[Okoye]] simultaneously, and would have killed the two had [[Wanda Maximoff]] not intervened in time and killed her. *'''Spear Mastery''': [[File:Scarlet Witch S IW 13.png|thumb|250px|Midnight fighting [[Wanda Maximoff|Maximoff]] with her [[Proxima Midnight's Spear|spear]]]] Midnight was extremely skilled at using a spear in combat, managing to repeatedly use it to attack [[Wanda Maximoff]] with it and also fight on par with both [[Steve Rogers]] and [[Natasha Romanoff]]. She was also able to throw the spear with deadly accuracy to impale her opponents or could blast them with energy from the spear's tip. *'''Sword Mastery''': Midnight was extremely skilled at using a sword in combat, being able to face [[Black Widow]] and [[Okoye]] with a sword, and also almost killed Black Widow with a retractable sword that she wore in her gauntlet. *'''Master Acrobat''': Midnight utilized several flips during her skirmish with Captain America and Black Widow to strategically position herself closer to her fallen husband while simultaneously moving her enemies away. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''[[Proxima Midnight's Spear]]''': [[File:Loki and The Black Order.jpg|thumb|250px|Proxima Midnight aiming her spear at [[Loki]]]] Proxima Midnight wielded a three-pronged spear in battle against her enemies. It could be thrown at blinding speeds, or utilized in combat to impale, slash or parry attacks. The spear could also discharge powerful bursts of energy that could knock down her foes. The spear could also be controlled telekinetically, as Midnight was able to summon it back into her hands. The spear was eventually broken when Captain America used [[Corvus Glaive]]'s [[Corvus Glaive's Glaive|glaive]] to slice it in half. *'''[[Proxima Midnight's Sword]]''': Proxima Midnight wielded a sword during the [[Battle of Wakanda]]. It was used to impale, slash and parry attacks. ===Other Equipment=== *'''Tactical Gauntlet''': Midnight wore a tactical gauntlet that contained several assets she could utilize in battle. **'''Gauntlet Blade''': Proxima Midnight used a blade concealed inside her gauntlet in an attempt to kill [[Black Widow]] during the Battle of Wakanda. **'''Wrist Communicator''': The gauntlet held a small communicator on its wrist that allowed Proxima to contact other members of the Black Order. *'''Armor''': Midnight wore reinforced armor, with a lighter armor on her torso flexibility and heavy armor on her arms for close combat.{{Ref|MSCE}} ===Vehicles=== *'''''[[Sanctuary II]]''''': Proxima Midnight, along the rest of the [[Black Order]], used this massive warship to go to different places in the universe along [[Thanos]] and the army. They used this ship to [[Attack on the Statesman|assault]] the ''[[Statesman]]'' in [[2018]]. *'''''[[Statesman]]''''': Midnight boarded this massive ship along Thanos and the Black Order to obtain the [[Space Stone]]. After some fights, Thanos obtained the Stone and they left the ship while it was destroyed by the [[Power Stone]]. *'''[[Q-Ship]]''': Proxima Midnight and [[Corvus Glaive]] used this ship to go to [[Edinburgh]] in order to obtain the [[Mind Stone]]. In the [[Attack on Vision|attack]] Glaive was hurted and her [[Proxima Midnight's Spear|spear]] destroyed. Without having option, she retreated along with Glaive to their waiting Q-Ship and fled to orbit to nurse their wounds. Later they met [[Cull Obsidian]] in the ship, and prepared for the [[Battle of Wakanda|final battle]] for the Mind Stone. *'''[[Outrider Dropship]]''': Midnight, Obsidian and Glaive used these ships to arrive on [[Wakanda]] before the [[Battle of Wakanda|battle]]. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[A'Lars]] - Adoptive Grandfather *[[Starfox|Eros/Starfox]] - Adoptive Uncle *[[Thanos]] † - Adoptive Father and Master *[[Black Order]] - Adoptive Siblings and Teammates **[[Corvus Glaive]] † - Adoptive Brother and Husband **[[Cull Obsidian]] † - Adoptive Brother **[[Ebony Maw]] † - Adoptive Brother *[[Gamora]] † - Adoptive Sister and Rival *[[Nebula]] - Adoptive Sister and Rival ===Allies=== *[[Outriders]] - Subordinates {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Asgardians]] **[[Valkyrie|Brunnhilde/Valkyrie]] **[[Heimdall]] † **[[Einherjar]] *[[Sakaaran Rebellion]] **[[Korg]] **[[Miek]] **[[Biff (Rebellion)|Biff]] **[[Tasba]] **[[Roscoe]] † *[[Loki]] † *[[Avengers]] **[[Thor]] **[[Hulk|Bruce Banner/Hulk]] **[[Wanda Maximoff]] † - Attempted Victim and Killer **[[Vision]] † - Attempted Victim **[[Steve Rogers|Steve Rogers/Captain America]] **[[Sam Wilson|Sam Wilson/Falcon]] **[[Black Widow|Natasha Romanoff/Black Widow]] † - Attempted Victim **[[War Machine|James Rhodes/War Machine]] *[[Golden Tribe]] **[[T'Challa|T'Challa/Black Panther]] † *[[Winter Soldier|Bucky Barnes/Winter Soldier]] *[[Dora Milaje]] *[[Okoye]] - Attempted Victim **[[Nomble]] **[[Yama]] *[[Jabari Tribe]] **[[M'Baku]] *[[Border Tribe]] *[[Wakandan Royal Guard]] *[[Guardians of the Galaxy]] **[[Rocket]] **[[Groot]] {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== |-|Chronological= In chronological order: *{{Appearance|GotG}} (indirectly mentioned) *{{Appearance|AIW}} **{{Appearance|AEP1}} **{{Appearance|AEP2}} **{{Appearance|AEP3}} *{{Appearance|LOftLG}} (indirectly mentioned) In an indefinite temporality: *{{Appearance|LK101}} (footage) |-|Narrative= In narrative order: *{{Appearance|GotG}} (indirectly mentioned) *{{Appearance|AIW}} **{{Appearance|AEP1}} **{{Appearance|AEP2}} **{{Appearance|AEP3}} *{{Appearance|LK101}} (footage) *{{Appearance|LOftLG}} (indirectly mentioned) ==Behind the Scenes== *[[Michael Shaw (actor)|Michael Shaw]] has stated that while it is not acknowledged in ''[[Avengers: Infinity War]]'', Proxima Midnight and [[Corvus Glaive]] are a married couple in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]].[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fh43gxcu91s Michael James Shaw: Becoming Marvel Infinity War's Villain Corvus Glaive!] *[[Monique Ganderton]] portrayed Proxima Midnight onset, with [[Carrie Coon]] coming in to record the character's voice and perform motion capture for her facial expressions in post-production, as Coon was pregnant during the film's production.[https://www.bustle.com/p/thanos-female-villain-in-infinity-war-has-a-complex-history-emmy-nominated-actor-in-her-shoes-8920328 Thanos' Female Villain In 'Infinity War' Has A Complex History — And An Emmy-Nominated Actor In Her Shoes] *The concept art for ''[[Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings]]'' by [[Andrew Kim]] featured Proxima Midnight fighting [[Deadpool]] at the [[Golden Daggers Club]] arena.[https://www.andrewkimart.com/#/new-gallery-1/ Andrew Kim Art] *[[Greg Rementer]] was a stunt double for [[Monique Ganderton]] in the role of Proxima Midnight.
